title: SS Arabic
summary:
SS Arabic may refer to:

SS Arabic (1881)
SS Arabic (1902), an ocean liner sunk by German submarine U-24 on 19 August 1915
SS Arabic (1920), the former SS Berlin; renamed Arabic in 1920; broken up in 1930
